world.comment: World size in px. 6000x3600 gives ~16:9 aspect.

camera.comment: Initial camera zoom (Pixi scale). Lower = see more map.

bots.comment: Max AI players in solo. Bots re-evaluate every thinkIntervalSeconds.

city.comment: population = city HP. At 150 pop, growth ~3.5/min. cityAttackTargets=2 so base defends itself vs small raids. cityAttackDamage=5 punishes unprotected scouts.

fighter.name: Корвет
fighter.comment: EARLY. Fastest unit. Cheap scout/harasser. DPS=2.4, cost/DPS=16.7. Fragile (45 hp). Mass effectively early, but melts vs AoE/cruisers.

destroyer.name: Эсминец
destroyer.comment: MID. Workhorse. 2x range of fighter. DPS=11.76, cost/DPS=38.3. Available ~2-3 min. Slower than fighters, so doesn't chase scouts.

cruiser.name: Крейсер
cruiser.comment: MID-LATE. Area denial. 3x range of fighter. DPS=25.2, cost/DPS=71.4. Kills fighter groups. Available ~8-10 min.

battleship.name: Линкор
battleship.comment: LATE. Siege breaker. 4 targets at long range. DPS=48.4, cost/DPS=103.3. Available ~15 min. Needs escort (slow).

hyperDestroyer.name: ГиперЛинкор
hyperDestroyer.comment: ENDGAME. Game-ender. 6 targets, massive range. DPS=97.2, cost/DPS=123.5. Available ~25 min. Very slow, high pop penalty.

mines.comment: 1 mine ≈ 60 eCredits/min. 2 starting mines = 120/min. Rich mine = 150/min. Control mines = faster tech-up.

eCredits.comment: 200 = 5 fighters or save for destroyer in ~2 min. Economy is mine-driven.

turret.comment: Border turrets. spacing=px between them. They slow attackers but won't stop a real army.

formation.comment: Visual formation grid. Mixed types: fighters front, destroyers mid, capitals rear.

terrain.comment: Zone shape: 96 rays, each stepped by 2px until influence budget depleted.

nebula.comment: Center nebula = contested zone. -50% speed, +25% dmg taken, +10% atk rate/range/dmg. High risk high reward.

waterBonus.comment: Cities near water grow faster. Threshold: 40% water tiles in zone.

xp.comment: xpNext = 160 + 16 * level * 1.05. Level 5 needs ~244 XP. Level 10 needs ~328 XP.

map.comment: FBM noise map generation. landThreshold controls land/water ratio.

fog.comment: Three fog states: unseen (near-black), seen (dim), visible (clear).

grid.comment: Debug grid overlay. Toggle in dev.

blackHole.comment: 3 min cooldown. 17s total (3s grow + 10s hold + 4s fade). R=400px. Pulls and damages units.

chainLightning.comment: Laser bounces to nearby enemies within 60px, losing 25% per bounce.

cryoEffect.comment: Slows target 40% for 2s. Stacks with nebula slow.

fireEffect.comment: 3 dmg/sec for 3s = 9 total bonus damage per hit.

combat.comment: Squad-first combat. engageRangeFactor controls start-of-fight contact, zoneJoinRadius expands nearby squads into the same battle, and disengage/regroup keeps post-battle recovery stable without auto-resuming generic move orders.

movement.comment: Movement/collision constants. minPersonalDist=16: units push apart if closer. separationPush=0.5: gentle repulsion.

formations.comment: Squad-first formations. formationCooldown=2.0 enforces max full-recalc frequency. facingLerpSpeed=3.0 rad/s for smooth rotation. steeringRadius=40 for enemy avoidance.
